dashboard.title: Preprocessing
dashboard.workflow.description: A tool for collecting voice data and creating TTS training datasets. Follow the steps below.
dashboard.workflow.step1.label: Register Speaker
dashboard.workflow.step2.label: Upload Media
dashboard.workflow.step3.label: Preprocess Videos
dashboard.workflow.step4.label: Build Dataset
dashboard.workflow.step5.label: CLI Training
dashboard.speaker.title: Register Speaker
dashboard.speaker.description: Register the speaker (voice owner) for TTS model training. If multiple people appear in the video, voice segments will be classified by speaker later.
dashboard.speaker.empty: No speakers registered. Enter a speaker name above and click Add.
dashboard.upload.title: Upload Media
dashboard.upload.description_line1: Upload video or audio files for training.
dashboard.upload.description_line2: You can add multiple videos to collect more data. Click on a video after upload to start preprocessing.
dashboard.upload.need_speaker: Please register a speaker above first.
dashboard.upload.empty: No videos uploaded. Use the button above to upload a file.
dashboard.upload.filename_conflict:
Files named 'extracted.wav' cannot be uploaded.
This name conflicts with the preprocessing pipeline. Please rename and re-upload.
dashboard.summary.title: Collection Status
dashboard.summary.description: Voice data collected by speaker from preprocessed videos.
dashboard.summary.hint: For quick testing, prepare about 10 minutes of clean audio. For stable quality, 20-45 minutes is recommended.
dashboard.dataset.title: Build Dataset
dashboard.dataset.description: Convert collected voice data into a TTS training dataset. Run this after completing preprocessing for all videos.
dashboard.dataset.empty: No preprocessed videos. Upload and preprocess videos first.
dashboard.dataset.val_ratio_desc: The proportion of data used for quality validation. 10-20% is generally appropriate. The rest is used for training.
dashboard.dataset.overwrite_note: If a dataset already exists, it will be deleted and recreated.
detail.stage_desc.extract.title: Audio Extraction
detail.stage_desc.extract.desc: Separates the audio track from the video file. Converts format for audio files.
detail.stage_desc.separate.title: Background Removal
detail.stage_desc.separate.desc: Removes background sounds like music and sound effects, extracting only vocals. May take several minutes depending on file length.
detail.stage_desc.vad.title: Voice Activity Detection (VAD)
detail.stage_desc.vad.desc: Automatically detects voice activity and splits into individual utterance segments. Adjust parameters below for better segmentation quality.
detail.stage_desc.classify.title: Speaker Classification
detail.stage_desc.classify.desc: Listen to each voice segment and assign it to the corresponding speaker. Noise or unnecessary segments can be discarded.
detail.stage_desc.transcribe.title: Speech-to-Text (STT)
detail.stage_desc.transcribe.desc: Automatically converts each voice segment to text. Results can be reviewed and edited in the next step.
detail.stage_desc.review.title: Transcription Review
detail.stage_desc.review.desc: Review and correct automatic transcription results. Accurate text directly affects TTS training quality.
detail.rollback_confirm:
Reprocess from "{stage}" stage?
All subsequent stage data will be deleted.
detail.rollback_hint: Click a completed stage to reprocess from that stage
detail.error.retry_hint: Click the button below to retry, or click a previous stage in the stepper above to rollback.
detail.separate_hint: Background removal may take several minutes to tens of minutes depending on audio length. Processing continues even if you leave this page.
detail.pending.title: Another video's background removal is in progress
detail.pending.desc: It will start automatically when complete. Please wait on this page.
detail.run_after_hint: If no error message appears after execution, processing is in progress. Please wait.
detail.vad.preset.default.label: Default
detail.vad.preset.noisy.label: Noisy Environment
detail.vad.preset.monologue.label: Long Monologue
detail.vad.min_segment_hint: Utterances shorter than this are discarded. 1-2 seconds recommended as very short audio is unsuitable for training.
detail.vad.max_segment_hint: Utterances longer than this are automatically split. 5-15 seconds is suitable for TTS training.
detail.vad.threshold_hint: Lower values capture more utterances; higher values keep only clear speech. Set 0.6-0.7 for noisy environments, 0.3-0.5 for quiet ones.
detail.vad.min_silence_hint: Segments are separated only when silence exceeds this length. Too small splits sentences into fragments; too large merges different utterances.
detail.vad.tips_toggle: View adjustment guide for specific scenarios
detail.vad.tip_fast_dialogue_desc: → Lower min silence to 30-50ms for better separation.
detail.vad.tip_noisy_desc: → Raise detection threshold to 0.6-0.7 to filter noise.
detail.vad.tip_monologue_desc: → Set max length to 10-15 seconds for natural splitting.
detail.vad.tip_interjection_desc: → Raise min length to 1.5-2 seconds to reduce unnecessary segments.
detail.done.title: Preprocessing Complete
detail.done.description: All preprocessing stages for this video are complete.
detail.done.back_hint: Return to dashboard to build a dataset or upload more videos to collect additional data.
classifier.title: Speaker Classification
classifier.description: Audio plays automatically. Click the speaker button matching the voice you hear, or use keyboard shortcuts. Noise, music, or unregistered voices can be excluded with "Discard".
classifier.all_done.title: All Segments Classified
classifier.all_done.description: All voice segments have been assigned to speakers.
classifier.confirm_done: Complete classification? Unclassified segments may remain.
review.title: Transcription Review
review.description: Review and correct automatic transcription (STT) results. Accurate text directly affects TTS training quality.
review.hint_play: Press play to listen to actual speech while comparing with text
review.hint_edit: Click text to edit directly (Enter to save, Esc to cancel)
review.hint_delete: Delete meaningless or incorrect entries with the × button
review.empty_text: (Empty text - click to enter or delete)
